text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...So please, help us!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: For all the trouble I've caused you so<n>far, I will apologize as many times as<n>it takes! But I need your cooperation<n>to make the Cheer Squad a success!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hm? Sure thing. The records of last<n>year's performance should be over<n>here somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I know it's a lot to ask after her<n>recent behavior, but King is—wait,<n>whaaat?! Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh? 'Course. It's rule fifty-six of<n>the disciplinary committee! "When<n>asked for help, act immediately"!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, i-it's just, you seemed really<n>angry with King this whole time...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's because her actions were<n>disturbing peace and order at the<n>time. But right now, you're looking for<n>help with the Cheer Squad, right?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So I have to help you! Simple as that!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: King and Nature
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Well then, let's get right into it. King,<n>what do you think is the most<n>important thing when it comes to<n>cheering at the Fan Fest?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Um, I think it's... joining together to<n>support the competitors who are<n>working hard in their events.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah, well that is important, butthere's one more thing that'sessential!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Keep in mind that you're the CheerSquad for the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: We put on the Fan Fest to show our<n>appreciation to the fans who always<n>support us.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So the main goal of every event is to<n>make sure our fans are having fun!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Same goes for the Cheer Squad!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The Cheer Squad's role is to have<n>fun with the fans as you cheer<n>together! It's not just about hyping<n>up the competitors, but the fans too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: We want cheering to be fun for them!<n>That's how the Cheer Squad shows<n>gratitude to the fans!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: In our world, there's usually a clear<n>line between the ones cheering and<n>the ones being cheered on.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But at the Fan Fest, the Cheer Squad<n>and the fans join together as<n>members of the same group!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The fans are also members of our<n>group...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, everyone! Cheer loud, cheer<n>proud, and have some fun! I grant<n>you all the right to match my<n>enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No, I can't. Look, they're not excited<n>at all! As the leader, I have to take<n>charge and get everyone fired up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I think I might have been too<n>controlling. Rather than stand side by<n>side with them, I tried to pull them<n>along behind me.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Then that's something to bear in<n>mind next time! You have the second<n>practice session next week, don't<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: King. As cheer captain, your job is to<n>make the Fan Fest a fun time for<n>everyone there.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Your voice reverberated across the<n>whole campus during practice. You're<n>going to make the real Fan Fest just<n>as memorable, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Yes!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: Oh, you want us to make cue cards<n>for the cheers? I think everyone in the<n>squad has them memorized already,<n>though...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I know, but we're not the only ones<n>in the Cheer Squad. I want all the fans<n>to be able to sing along too. So<n>please!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: Oh, that makes sense! We've only<n>told them by word of mouth up till<n>now. I'll get to it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I also want the fans to have<n>a chance to give us feedback before<n>the real event, so I'm thinking of<n>holding an informal meeting.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: Since it's informal, should we prepare<n>some drinks and stuff?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Good idea! I'll get right to arrang...<n>Um...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sorry, could I ask you to arrange the<n>drinks? You'd be doing me a great<n>favor.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: Ah! Sure! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: It looks like she's not so tense<n>anymore, and her communication has<n>improved. Nature, what kind of magic<n>have you worked on her?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What? Oh, stop it. I can't do magic or<n>anything special like that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It was King's idea. She decided to<n>lean on us more, even for the little<n>things. So that we can all cheer with a<n>smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon enough, it's the day of the<n>second practice cheer session.

text_block_list.name: Fans and Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Go, go, let's go! Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I can't wait for the big day to<n>come around! We were all in sync<n>today!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I've got the cheers down now<n>too! I'm ready to shout out loud for<n>our Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (The cheers this practice session<n>were much more in sync than the<n>first. Everyone looked cheerful too,<n>like they were more confident it'd go<n>well.)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (And our cheer captain next to me<n>was laughing happily too.)
